title: ADP session part (layer 2)
description: Refined canonical session descriptor. Generalizes an rfr 'ride' block to any action sport. Carries per-source device-reported aggregates that are NOT re-derivable from the 1 Hz timeline (facts). Carries NO service metadata: no owner, visibility, or status.

session_ref.description: Stable UUID of the logical activity; matches the manifest and every other part.

duration_s.description: Wall-clock span of the session in seconds (ended - started).

activity_hint.description: Best-guess activity type (e.g. mtb, run, road, snowboard). A HINT for defaults/UX, NOT a locked sport classification. Free text; common values suggested by examples.

timezone.description: IANA timezone the activity was recorded in.

source_summaries.description: Per-source device-reported aggregates that the 1 Hz timeline cannot reproduce (calories, training load, grit/flow, laps, respiration, Bosch avg/max power+cadence). Each is provenance-stamped with its originating source. These are FACTS and travel in the package.

source.description: Originating source id (e.g. garmin, bosch). Provenance stamp for this summary.

sport.description: Sport as reported by this device (e.g. cycling / e_biking). Device-native, informational.

metrics.description: Device-reported aggregate metrics. Open set (devices differ). Known keys are documented below; unknown numeric aggregates are permitted.
